user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume, it also shoulnd't bring me back to the menu screen, can you fix that, it should ust freeze the game

but I also don't want the hud/cursor/controls text to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: The ESC key handling has logic that returns to BASE screen from HEROES or DUNGEON screens instead of pausing the game. The user wants ESC to simply freeze the game state without changing screens or showing overlays.

- Files affected: game.js (the keypress handling function needs modification)

- Changes needed: Remove the conditional logic that checks for HEROES or DUNGEON screens and returns to BASE. Make ESC key always toggle between PLAYING and PAUSED states, keeping the current screen intact. The rendering already correctly shows the frozen screen without overlays when paused.
